MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS KRISPY KREME, and GOLDEN GATE DOUGHNUTS,LLC's Motion For An Order Seeking Leave Of The Court To File A Cross-Complaint Against Hilbers Construction Company.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Krispy Kreme and Golden Gate Doughnuts, LLC's unopposed "motion for an order seeking leave of the court to file a cross-complaint against Hilbers Construction Company" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Atty. SAAGARIKA COLEMAN, Esq. of Law Offices of Santana, Vierra, Stevenson, Harris & Hermanson (Tel: 415-777-1308) for defendants Krispy Kreme and Golden Gate Doughnuts, LLC.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT JBI INTERIORS, LLC's Motion To Compel Co-Defendants, Golden Gate Doughnuts, LLC And Krispy Kreme's, Verified Responses To Request For Admissions, Set One, Form Interrogatories, Set One And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Co-Defendants, Golden Gate Doughnuts, LLC And Krispy Kreme.

Appearing parties stipulate to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge and counsel for appearing parties (all appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The Motion is granted. Sanctions are awarded to moving party in the amount of $750.

The prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order to the pro tem judge at tom@thomascohen.com.
